attributes.description: Cost reporting for Anthropic API consumption. Covers total spend by workspace, billing line item breakdown, inference geography (data residency), and invoice reconciliation. Data sourced from metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-*.

embeddableConfig.content:
## Anthropic — Cost & Billing
Detailed cost reporting across all workspaces, models, and inference geographies. Aligned with **Anthropic's billing line items** for invoice reconciliation.

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd)
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd)
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | STATS workspace_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(anthropic.cost.workspace_id)
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | STATS workspace_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(anthropic.cost.workspace_id)
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | STATS line_items = COUNT_DISTINCT(anthropic.cost.description)
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | STATS line_items = COUNT_DISTINCT(anthropic.cost.description)

attributes.description: Line-by-line cost breakdown aligned with Anthropic invoice format including model and inference geography for full attribution.

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd), record_count = COUNT(*) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id, anthropic.cost.model, anthropic.cost.inference_geo, anthropic.cost.description, anthropic.cost.currency | SORT anthropic.cost.workspace_id ASC, `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd), record_count = COUNT(*) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id, anthropic.cost.model, anthropic.cost.inference_geo, anthropic.cost.description, anthropic.cost.currency | SORT anthropic.cost.workspace_id ASC, `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

attributes.title: Invoice Reconciliation

embeddableConfig.description: Line-by-line cost breakdown aligned with Anthropic invoice format including model and inference geography for full attribution.
embeddableConfig.title: Invoice Reconciliation

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS total_cost_usd = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id | SORT total_cost_usd DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS total_cost_usd = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id | SORT total_cost_usd DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.model IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS total_cost_usd = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.model | SORT total_cost_usd DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.model IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS total_cost_usd = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.model | SORT total_cost_usd DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.inference_geo IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS total_cost_usd = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.inference_geo | SORT total_cost_usd DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.inference_geo IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS total_cost_usd = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.inference_geo | SORT total_cost_usd DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.inference_geo IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.model IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.inference_geo, anthropic.cost.model | SORT `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.inference_geo IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.model IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.inference_geo, anthropic.cost.model | SORT `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.inference_geo IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id, anthropic.cost.inference_geo | SORT `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.inference_geo IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id, anthropic.cost.inference_geo | SORT `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

attributes.title: Cost by Workspace and Inference Geography

embeddableConfig.title: Cost by Workspace and Inference Geography

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.model IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id, anthropic.cost.model | SORT `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.model IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.cost.workspace_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY anthropic.cost.workspace_id, anthropic.cost.model | SORT `Total Cost (USD)` DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.cost-* | WHERE anthropic.cost.amount IS NOT NULL | EVAL amount_usd = anthropic.cost.amount / 100.0 | STATS `Total Cost (USD)` = SUM(amount_usd) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC
